progress_summary: Active site (opchain.dev + staging.opchain.dev). Sprint 7c (CSP nonce migration) shipped to main. Sprints 1-6 closed. B-10 color-contrast token sweep RESOLVED (round 1 deltas in main pre-session, round 2 success-token follow-up shipped this session). B-11 (per-route COLOR_CONTRAST_DISABLE removal) in progress: 1/7 routes cleared. Per-PR babysitting active for several recent merges.

key_decisions: Site: Astro 5 (static) → Cloudflare Worker static-asset binding. Worker runs at opchain-dev (prod) and opchain-staging (staging). Custom domains via custom_domain: true — Cloudflare manages DNS automatically.

Deploys are MANUAL — `npm run deploy:staging` then `npm run deploy`. There is no CI/CD path; deploy.yml + promote.yml were removed because GitHub Actions Cloudflare token couldn't reliably manage routes/DNS in the opchain.dev zone.

Analytics: Cloudflare Web Analytics (cookieless, no banner) + PostHog Cloud EU (consent-gated via ConsentBanner.astro). Server-side capture from Worker fires zip_downloaded, feedback_submitted, notify_submitted. Client-side fires $pageview (autocapture) + install_copy_clicked. Three reserved client events declared but not wired: skill_filter_used, skill_detail_viewed, in_action_scenario_opened.
CSP (Sprint 7c): script-src 'self' 'nonce-...' 'strict-dynamic'. NO 'unsafe-inline'. Inline event handler attributes (onclick=, onmouseenter=, etc.) are blocked — must use addEventListener instead.

Skill catalog: 17 skills shown in /skills, 5 phases (discover/plan/build/ship/monitor), checkpoint-protocol + orchestrator as foundation. Architecture diagram on /architecture is the v2 interactive build.

session_dispatches.intent: pick up app-architect; cookies/tracking; why not amplitude
reconcile event taxonomy with shipped code

merged_prs_this_session: PR #134 — docs(analytics): reconcile event taxonomy with shipped code
PR #136 — fix(B-10): darken light --success to clear AA-normal on /skills role tag
PR #138 — fix(architecture): wire diagram events via addEventListener for CSP
PR #139 — feat(architecture): one-shot auto-cycle on page load
user_preferences: Direct, terse communication. Short tool prompts, brief PR bodies, no marketing prose
Uses /<skill> shorthand — invokes skills by their command form
Asks questions back via AskUserQuestion (not free-form prompts) when given the option
Wants ONE recommendation from /ops next, not a list
Says 'merge' as a one-word command; expects PR to be CI-green or imminently green
Asks me to backfill checkpoints at session-end rather than per-skill

blockers.description: Three reserved client events declared in site/src/lib/analytics.ts but not wired to any caller: skill_filter_used, skill_detail_viewed, in_action_scenario_opened
blockers.proposed_resolution: Either wire to /skills filter UI + /skills/<id> + /demo scenario opens, OR drop from the ClientEvent union and document as 'no client UI events for now'. Surface this when the user next opens /ops next.

next_actions: Pick up B-11: drop COLOR_CONTRAST_DISABLE per-route. Order of attack — easiest first: /privacy and /styleguide (least visual complexity), then /install, /skills/<id>, /architecture, /demo. Each likely a small standalone PR or batched once verified.
Surface the reserved-events decision (skill_filter_used / skill_detail_viewed / in_action_scenario_opened) — wire or drop.
Manual deploys to staging + prod for the 4 PRs that landed this session. Order: `npm run deploy:staging`, eyeball, `npm run deploy`. CLAUDE.md is explicit that this is the only path.

opchain.dev.status_summary: Active site, 4 PRs merged this session, 1 reserved-events decision pending

skill_state.note: Per the orchestrator skill spec, the canonical orchestrator session state lives at ~/.opchain/orchestrator.session.json (ephemeral) and a memory edit (persistent registry). This project-scoped checkpoint exists only because the user explicitly asked to backfill 'per-skill' checkpoints for this session.
